message.content:
@startuml
participant "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as :ProjectManagerUI
participant "AGVServer" as AGVServer
participant "AGVServerThread" as AGVServerThread
participant "AVGManagerController" as AVGManagerController
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as AGVDigitalTwinServer
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as AGVDigitalTwinThread
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as AGVDigitalTwinController
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as CodingAndDecoding2

actor PM

PM -> :ProjectManagerUI :Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV
:ProjectManagerUI -> AGVServer :message
AGVServer -> AGVServerThread :accept
AGVServerThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 :start
CodingAndDecoding2 -> AGVDigitalTwinServer :Decoding(r)
AGVDigitalTwinServer -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :message
AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinController :accept
AGVDigitalTwinController -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :doTask(taskPerform)
AGVDigitalTwinThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 :TaskReportMessage
CodingAndDecoding2 -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :TaskReportMessage
AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinController :ResponseMessage
AGVDigitalTwinController -> AGVServerThread :ResponseMessage
AGVServerThread -> :ProjectManagerUI :ResponseMessage
:ProjectManagerUI -> PM :Informs operation success

loop [until orderList is empty]
    AVGManagerController -> AGVServer :findavailableOrder()
    AGVServer -> AVGManagerController :findavailableAGV(weight, volume)
    AVGManagerController -> AGVServer :createTaskandSave(description, order, agv)
    AVGManagerController -> AGVDigitalTwinServer :doTask()
    AGVDigitalTwinServer -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :message
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinController :accept
    AGVDigitalTwinController -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :doTask(taskPerform)
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 :TaskReportMessage
    CodingAndDecoding2 -> AGVDigitalTwinThread :TaskReportMessage
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinController :ResponseMessage
    AGVDigitalTwinController -> AGVServerThread :ResponseMessage
    AGVServerThread -> :ProjectManagerUI :ResponseMessage
end

@enduml
